demographics.living_situation: shares a flat with a roommate

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach is in agony, I can't keep any water down, and I feel like I can't get enough air into my lungs.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Been throwing up all morning and can't stop, the belly pain is really bad, and now I'm breathing hard and feel really weak and foggy. My roommate is worried and made the call.

symptom_narrative.onset: the last couple of days I've been really off, and it got much worse this morning
symptom_narrative.duration: about 48 hours, with a sharp deterioration over the last 6 hours
symptom_narrative.character: constant sick feeling with repeated vomiting, a cramping all-over belly ache, and heavy fast breathing I can't slow down
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst I've felt — I can barely stand and I feel really weak and a bit confused
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over my belly, and the breathing feels like it's in my chest
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing, I can't even keep water down
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to drink or move makes the vomiting and dizziness worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: over the last day or two I've been weeing constantly, so thirsty I can't drink enough, and I think I've lost weight fast
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed, I get severe dizziness if I try to stand

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: type 1 diabetes — I've had it for years and I'm on insulin
past_medical_history.how_managed: long-acting background insulin plus fast-acting insulin with meals

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with a roommate who is present and worried; the roommate says they don't know how to help with something this serious

objective_data_offered.value: meter just says HIGH — it won't give a number, it says that's over 33.3
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: home glucometer reading above its measurable range; patient-stated, not laboratory-measured
home capillary ketone meter; patient-stated, single reading, not laboratory-measured

objective_data_offered.value: roommate says my breathing is deep, fast and heavy, like I can't slow it down
roommate says I seem confused, foggy and very weak, and I look unwell and sweaty
